name: HWR_COMBO_CONTACT_VL
query: SELECT IUH1.ADDRESS_LINE_1, IUH1.ADDRESS_LINE_2, IUH1.ADDRESS_LINE_3, IUH1.ADDRESS_LINE_4, IUH1.ADDRESS, IUH1.BUILDING, IUH1.COUNTRY, IUH1.DERIVED_LOCALE, IUH1.FLOOR_NUMBER, IUH1.LATITUDE, IUH1.LONGITUDE, IUH1.LONG_POSTAL_CODE, IUH1.ONLINE_ACCOUNT, IUH1.ONLINE_ACCT_HOMEPAGE, IUH1.POSTAL_CODE, IUH1.REGION_1, IUH1.REGION_2, IUH1.REGION_3, IUH1.TIMEZONE_CODE, IUH1.TOWN_OR_CITY, IUH1.URL, IUH1.CREATED_BY, IUH1.CREATION_DATE, IUH1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, IUH1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, IUH1.PRFL_ID, IUH1.SOURCE_ID, IUH1.FULLPHONENUMBER, IUH1.EMAIL, IUH1.EMAIL2 FROM ( SELECT ADDRESSDPEO.ADDRESS_LINE_1, ADDRESSDPEO.ADDRESS_LINE_2, ADDRESSDPEO.ADDRESS_LINE_3, ADDRESSDPEO.ADDRESS_LINE_4, NVL2(ADDRESSDPEO.ADDRESS_LINE_1,ADDRESSDPEO.ADDRESS_LINE_1 || ' ','') || NVL2(ADDRESSDPEO.ADDRESS_LINE_2,ADDRESSDPEO.ADDRESS_LINE_2 || ' ','') || NVL2(ADDRESSDPEO.ADDRESS_LINE_3,ADDRESSDPEO.ADDRESS_LINE_3 || ' ','') || NVL2(ADDRESSDPEO.ADDRESS_LINE_4,ADDRESSDPEO.ADDRESS_LINE_4 || ' ','') || NVL2(ADDRESSDPEO.BUILDING,ADDRESSDPEO.BUILDING || ' ','') || NVL2(ADDRESSDPEO.FLOOR_NUMBER,ADDRESSDPEO.FLOOR_NUMBER || ' ','') || NVL2(ADDRESSDPEO.TOWN_OR_CITY,ADDRESSDPEO.TOWN_OR_CITY || ' ','') || NVL2(ADDRESSDPEO.REGION_1,ADDRESSDPEO.REGION_1 || ' ','') || NVL2(ADDRESSDPEO.REGION_2,ADDRESSDPEO.REGION_2 || ' ','') || NVL2(ADDRESSDPEO.REGION_3,ADDRESSDPEO.REGION_3 || ' ','') || NVL2(ADDRESSDPEO.COUNTRY,ADDRESSDPEO.COUNTRY || ' ','') || NVL2(ADDRESSDPEO.POSTAL_CODE,ADDRESSDPEO.POSTAL_CODE || ' ','') AS ADDRESS, ADDRESSDPEO.BUILDING, ADDRESSDPEO.COUNTRY, ADDRESSDPEO.DERIVED_LOCALE, ADDRESSDPEO.FLOOR_NUMBER, NULL AS LATITUDE, NULL AS LONGITUDE, ADDRESSDPEO.LONG_POSTAL_CODE, NULL AS ONLINE_ACCOUNT, NULL AS ONLINE_ACCT_HOMEPAGE, ADDRESSDPEO.POSTAL_CODE, ADDRESSDPEO.REGION_1, ADDRESSDPEO.REGION_2, ADDRESSDPEO.REGION_3, ADDRESSDPEO.TIMEZONE_CODE, ADDRESSDPEO.TOWN_OR_CITY, NULL AS URL, PERSONADDRESSUSAGEDPEO.ADDRESS_ID, ADDRESSDPEO.ADDRESS_ID AS ADDRESSDPEODDRESS_ID, P.CREATED_BY, P.CREATION_DATE, P.LAST_UPDATED_BY, P.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, P.PRFL_ID, P.SOURCE_ID, P.FULLPHONENUMBER, P.EMAIL, P.EMAIL2 FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT PROFILEB_1.CREATED_BY, PROFILEB_1.CREATION_DATE, PROFILEB_1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, PROFILEB_1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, PROFILEB_1.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, PROFILEB_1.PRFL_ID, PROFILEB_1.SOURCE_ID, NVL2(PHONEPEO.AREA_CODE,PHONEPEO.AREA_CODE || ' ','') || PHONEPEO.PHONE_NUMBER AS FULLPHONENUMBER, PROFILEB_1.EMAIL, HWR_CONTACT_INFO_VL.EMAIL AS EMAIL2 FROM HWR_SRC_SOURCE_B SRCB INNER JOIN HWR_SRC_SRCTYPE_B STB ON SRCB.SOURCE_TYPE_ID = STB.SOURCE_TYPE_ID INNER JOIN HWR_PER_PROFILE_B PROFILEB_1 ON SRCB.SOURCE_ID = PROFILEB_1.SOURCE_ID INNER JOIN PER_PHONES PHONEPEO ON PHONEPEO.PERSON_ID = PROFILEB_1.PRFL_ID INNER JOIN HWR_CONTACT_INFO_VL ON HWR_CONTACT_INFO_VL.PRFL_ID = PROFILEB_1.PRFL_ID WHERE PROFILEB_1.IS_ACTIVE_FLAG = 'Y' AND STB.SOURCE_TYPE_KEY = 'Fusion' ) P, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M ASSIGNMENTDPEO, PER_ADDRESSES_F ADDRESSDPEO, PER_PERSON_ADDR_USAGES_F PERSONADDRESSUSAGEDPEO, PER_ASSIGNMENT_SUPERVISORS_F ASSIGNMENTSUPERVISORDPEO WHERE ASSIGNMENTDPEO.PERSON_ID (+) = TO_NUMBER(P.PRFL_ID) AND ASSIGNMENTDPEO.PRIMARY_FLAG = 'Y' AND ASSIGNMENTDPEO.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE IN ( 'E', 'C', 'N' ) AND PERSONADDRESSUSAGEDPEO.PERSON_ID = ASSIGNMENTDPEO.PERSON_ID AND ASSIGNMENTSUPERVISORDPEO.ASSIGNMENT_ID (+) = ASSIGNMENTDPEO.ASSIGNMENT_ID AND ASSIGNMENTSUPERVISORDPEO.PRIMARY_FLAG (+) = 'Y' AND ASSIGNMENTSUPERVISORDPEO.MANAGER_TYPE (+) = 'LINE_MANAGER' AND ( ASSIGNMENTSUPERVISORDPEO.ASSIGNMENT_ID IS NOT NULL OR ASSIGNMENTDPEO.PERSON_ID IN ( SELECT DISTINCT INNERASSIGNSUPERVISORPEO.MANAGER_ID FROM PER_ASSIGNMENT_SUPERVISORS_F INNERASSIGNSUPERVISORPEO ) ) ) IUH1 UNION ALL SELECT IUH2.ADDRESS_LINE_1, IUH2.ADDRESS_LINE_2, IUH2.ADDRESS_LINE_3, IUH2.ADDRESS_LINE_4, IUH2.ADDRESS, IUH2.BUILDING, IUH2.COUNTRY, IUH2.DERIVED_LOCALE, IUH2.FLOOR_NUMBER, IUH2.LATITUDE, IUH2.LONGITUDE, IUH2.LONG_POSTAL_CODE, IUH2.ONLINE_ACCOUNT, IUH2.ONLINE_ACCT_HOMEPAGE, IUH2.POSTAL_CODE, IUH2.REGION_1, IUH2.REGION_2, IUH2.REGION_3, IUH2.TIMEZONE_CODE, IUH2.TOWN_OR_CITY, IUH2.URL, IUH2.CREATED_BY, IUH2.CREATION_DATE, IUH2.LAST_UPDATED_BY, IUH2.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, IUH2.PRFL_ID, IUH2.SOURCE_ID, IUH2.FULLPHONENUMBER, IUH2.EMAIL, IUH2.EMAIL2 FROM ( SELECT CONTACTINFO.ADDRESS_LINE_1, CONTACTINFO.ADDRESS_LINE_2, CONTACTINFO.ADDRESS_LINE_3, CONTACTINFO.ADDRESS_LINE_4, CONTACTINFO.ADDRESS, CONTACTINFO.BUILDING, CONTACTINFO.CONTACT_INFO_ID, CONTACTINFO.COUNTRY, CONTACTINFO.DERIVED_LOCALE, CONTACTINFO.FLOOR_NUMBER, CONTACTINFO.HASHING_TYPE, CONTACTINFO.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, CONTACTINFO.LATITUDE, CONTACTINFO.LONGITUDE, CONTACTINFO.LONG_POSTAL_CODE, CONTACTINFO.ONLINE_ACCOUNT, CONTACTINFO.ONLINE_ACCT_HOMEPAGE, CONTACTINFO.POSTAL_CODE, CONTACTINFO.REGION_1, CONTACTINFO.REGION_2, CONTACTINFO.REGION_3, CONTACTINFO.TIMEZONE_CODE, CONTACTINFO.TOWN_OR_CITY, CONTACTINFO.URL, CONTACTINFO.CREATED_BY, CONTACTINFO.CREATION_DATE, CONTACTINFO.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CONTACTINFO.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CONTACTINFO.PRFL_ID, CONTACTINFO.SOURCE_ID, CONTACTINFO.PHONE AS FULLPHONENUMBER, NULL AS EMAIL, CONTACTINFO.EMAIL AS EMAIL2 FROM HWR_CONTACT_INFO_VL CONTACTINFO, HWR_SRC_SOURCE_B SRCB, HWR_SRC_SRCTYPE_B SRCTYPETL WHERE CONTACTINFO.SOURCE_ID = SRCB.SOURCE_ID AND SRCB.SOURCE_TYPE_ID = SRCTYPETL.SOURCE_TYPE_ID AND SRCTYPETL.SOURCE_TYPE_KEY != 'Fusion' ) IUH2
